A remarkable feature of the build
ing of the big underground passage
way is the unusually small number
of fatalities attending 1t. Three lives
were lost in the single cavein that
occurred No other fatal accidents
were encountered, and very few work.
men were in any way injured.


The new tunnel is entitled to its
claim of being the longest double
track tunnel in the United States ow-
ing to the fact that the Grand Trunk
from Port Huron Mich, to Sarna,
Ont, which is longer, runs into Ca
